name: Aptera Motors Corp
business: Aptera Motors Corp. is a public benefit corporation and development stage company focused on the development and commercialization of solar electric vehicles. Our principal business is the development, production, and distribution of energy efficient solar-powered, battery-electric vehicles.
namedSuppliers: Chery New Energy Automobile Co. Ltd.

exposures.sentence: Our principal business is the development, production, and distribution of energy efficient solar-powered, battery-electric vehicles.
The Aptera vehicle is designed to provide up to an estimated 40 miles per day by collecting energy from the sun and storing it in our proprietary battery pack.
We have been affected by ongoing, industry-wide challenges in logistics and supply chains, such as increased supplier lead times and ongoing constraints of semiconductor supply.
Tariffs and related trade barriers could materially adversely affect our business, results of operations and financial condition.

catalysts.sentence: We remain committed to commencing low-volume production as soon as possible, with a current goal of delivering the first customer vehicles in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The global EV market was valued at approximately $892 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $2.1 trillion by 2032.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Fortune Business Insights, the global EV market was valued at approximately $892 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $2.1 trillion by 2032.

tamClaims.claim: Global EV sales surpassed 20 million units in 2025, accounting for approximately one-quarter of all new car sales worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the International Energy Agency, global EV sales surpassed 20 million units in 2025, accounting for approximately one-quarter of all new car sales worldwide.
